mechanism: As CLO equity IRRs compress toward the 11-12% threshold, new CLO formation slows, removing ~65-70% of institutional leveraged loan demand. This constrains refinancing capacity exactly when $900B-$1.5T of sub-IG debt needs to roll, creating a credit supply squeeze.
regime_dependence: Binding when CLO equity IRRs are near or below threshold AND maturity wall refinancing needs are concentrated. Currently in early stages of potential convergence.
